title: Suki Gifts Yomiko Classics Jungle and Wildlife Lying Giraffe (Medium, Brown)
features: Suki Gifts Yomiko Classics, Jungle & Wildlife - medium lying Giraffe
Orange and cream soft caress plush toy with airbrushed details to the face, ears and feet
Part of the Yomiko Classics lifelike animals collections
description: Product Description Supersoft plush medium lying Giraffe from Suki Gifts famous Yomiko Classics Jungle & Wildlife collection. Premium quality caress soft orange and cream animal style print plush Giraffe with realistic features and airbrushed details to the face, ears and feet. Yomiko Classics are a world famous brand offering a broad collection of realistically styled animals, many of which are uniquely enhanced with air brushed features. Approximately 14 inches (35.6 cm) high. Suitable for all ages. Hand wash and air dry. Other sizes and friends also available in the Yomiko Classics range of sitting and lying Cats, Dogs and Jungle animals. Please remove all tags before giving this to a child. Suki Gifts are an innovative British company, providing high quality gifts and soft toys including Baby, Teddy Bears, Plush toys, Mugs, Piggy Banks and much more. Box Contains 1 x Suki Gifts Yomiko Classics, Jungle & Wildlife medium lying Giraffe soft toy
